People

David Litwin

Principal Investigator

David leads the hydrology and landscape dynamics lab at Temple. He was previously an assistant professor of instruction at Temple and a postdoctoral researcher at GFZ Helmholtz Center for Geosciences in Potsdam, Germany. He completed a Ph.D. in environmental engineering at Johns Hopkins University in Baltimore, Maryland and undergraduate degrees in civil engineering and music performance from University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign. He also plays in klezmer bands across the region and can regularly be seen wheeling a double bass around Philadelphia.

Download CV (PDF)
